narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: सर्दी के बाद सीधे आ रही गर्मी, आखिर कैसे गायब हो गया बसंत का मौसम?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The headline and repeated statements throughout the text emphasize the dramatic and alarming disappearance of the spring season, framing climate change as causing a direct and unsettling disruption to traditional weather patterns, which amplifies concern and fear.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कई भारतीयों का कहना है कि बसंत का मौसम जैसे गायब सा हो गया है. तापमान अब काफी जल्दी सर्दी से गर्मी जैसी परिस्थितियों में बदल जाता है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly presents a perceived loss (the disappearance of spring) and a rapid, jarring shift in seasons, which serves to amplify public anxiety about the tangible impacts of climate change on daily life and natural cycles.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इन क्षेत्रों में अब सर्दी जैसे ठंडे तापमान से सीधे तौर पर गर्म परिस्थितियों वाले अचानक बदलाव की आशंका प्रबल हो गई है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text explicitly states a 'strong probability' of a sudden, direct shift from cold to hot conditions, framing this as a new and alarming risk due to climate change, which heightens fears about unpredictable and extreme weather.
